# CWE-261 — Weak Encoding for Password (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-261-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var accountVault sync.Map

// Vulnerable: stores reversible base64 of the password instead of a hash.
func SignupHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	user := r.FormValue("username")
	pw := r.FormValue("password")
	if user == "" || pw == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing credentials", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	encoded := base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString([]byte(pw))
	accountVault.Store(user, encoded)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
